projectDescription: An 11-swatch Tailwind CSS palette generator and REST API that creates perceptually-consistent color palettes from a single hex value with HSL tweaking controls.
keyFeatures: 11-stop color palette generation (50–950) from a single hex value
HSL tweaking controls: hue shift, saturation boost, min/max lightness
Two color modes: perceived (HSLuv) and linear (HSL)
Multiple output formats: oklch, hex, hsl, display-p3
Tailwind CSS v3 and v4 config output
Shareable palette URLs via base64-encoded hash
REST API for programmatic palette generation
Auto stop-selection based on color lightness/luminance
publicApiSurface: GET /api/:name/:value — Named palette by hex (redirects to hash URL)
createSwatches(palette: PaletteConfig) — Core swatch generation function
deserializePalette(hash: string): PaletteConfig | null — Palette deserialization
output(palettes: PaletteConfig[], mode: Mode) — Format palette for Tailwind config
createDisplayColor(color: string, mode?: Mode, alphaPlaceholder?: boolean): string | null
